mapper.sql: id, bucket_name, user_id, tenant_id, file_count, storage_size, storage_quota, usage_percentage, standard_size, ia_size, archive_size, cold_archive_size, stat_date, stat_hour, created_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bucket_storage_log WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName} ORDER BY stat_date DESC, stat_hour DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO bucket_storage_log ( bucket_name, user_id, tenant_id, file_count, storage_size, storage_quota, usage_percentage, standard_size, ia_size, archive_size, cold_archive_size, stat_date, stat_hour ) VALUES
(#{item.bucketName}, #{item.userId}, #{item.tenantId}, #{item.fileCount}, #{item.storageSize}, #{item.storageQuota}, #{item.usagePercentage}, #{item.standardSize}, #{item.iaSize}, #{item.archiveSize}, #{item.coldArchiveSize}, #{item.statDate}, #{item.statHour})
